title: BUProfile
description: Business Unit configuration. Read-only input to BUAtlas; authored and maintained as versioned YAML in config/ and validated against this schema. This file contains no PII by contract — all 'name' values are display names only, not email addresses or employee IDs.

bu_id.description: Stable lowercase identifier for this BU (e.g., 'immunology', 'oncology', 'neuroscience'). Must be unique across the registry.

name.description: Human-readable display name for this BU (e.g., 'Immunology BU', 'Oncology Business Unit').

head.description: Primary BU head for notification routing. No contact details — channel adapters resolve those from the directory.

name.description: Display name of the BU head. Not an email address.

role.description: Organizational role title (e.g., 'VP General Manager, Immunology').

delegate_ids.description: Opaque recipient IDs of named delegates who can receive or approve on behalf of the BU head.

therapeutic_area.description: Primary therapeutic area for this BU (e.g., 'immunology', 'neuroscience', 'oncology'). Placeholder field in v1; will align with the official AbbVie BU taxonomy once loaded. Null until taxonomy is loaded.

owned_product_areas.description: Product area identifiers owned by this BU. Must match the impact_areas vocabulary used in ChangeBriefs. Used by the BU pre-filter and BUAtlas gate 4.

channels.description: Approved delivery channels for this BU, in preference order.

quiet_hours.description: Quiet hours window during which no push notifications are sent.

start.description: Quiet hours start time in HH:MM format (24-hour, local to timezone).

end.description: Quiet hours end time in HH:MM format (24-hour, local to timezone).

digest_opt_in.description: Whether this BU has opted into digest-format notifications for P2 items.

max_notifications_per_week.description: Optional cap on push notifications per week. Null means no cap. Enforced by the rate-limit policy hook.

active_initiatives.description: Freeform descriptions of current BU initiatives. Used by BUAtlas gate 4 to assess contextual relevance ('BU currently cares about X'). Sanitized — no confidential strategy details.

escalation_contact.description: Human contact for escalated or unresolved items for this BU. No contact details — channel adapters resolve those.

name.description: Display name of the escalation contact.

role.description: Organizational role of the escalation contact.

okrs_current_quarter.description: Summarized, sanitized OKRs for the current quarter. Used by BUAtlas to assess whether a change aligns with current BU priorities. No confidential financial targets.

historical_notification_feedback_summary.description: Aggregate statistics only — no PII. Null until the feedback-loop implementation in a later prompt. Exact shape is TODO. Used by BUAtlas to calibrate message quality expectations.
